'''Sk'kot Burrid''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Corporal/Legends|corporal]] who served in [[Bria Tharen]]'s [[Red Hand Squadron]] of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
Burrid was stationed aboard the [[Marauder-class Assault Corvette/Legends|''Marauder''-class corvette]] [[Retribution (Marauder-class)|''Retribution'']] when the Rebels attacked the [[Ylesia/Legends|Ylesian]] slave ship [[Emancipator (CR90 corvette)|''Helot's Shackle'']] outbound to [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]]. Originally, he was slated to board the ''Helot's Shackle'' with the rest of his squad; having developed a mild fever, however, Burrid was ordered off the mission despite his own assurances that he felt fit for duty. Later, he participated in the [[Battle of Ylesia]] as part of a squad assaulting Colony One.

Sk'kot Burrid was killed along with the rest of Red Hand Squadron on [[Toprawa/Legends|Toprawa]] while attempting to transmit the [[Death Star plans/Legends|Death Star plans]] to [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Rebel Dawn]]'' {{1st}}
